characteristic.name: PLX Continuous Measurement
characteristic.informativeText: Summary: The PLX Continuous Measurement characteristic, if supported, is used to send periodic pulse oximetry measurements. This characteristic is a variable length structure containing the Flags field (to indicate presence of optional fields), the SpO2PR-Normal field, and depending on the contents of the Flags field, the SpO2PR-Fast field, the SpO2PR-Slow field, the Measurement Status field, the Device and Sensor Status field, and/or the Pulse Amplitude Index field.
